sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date, description String);

INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'), 'New Year'), (2, toDate('2020-05-15'), 'Mid-May'), (3, toDate('2019-12-31'), 'Year End'), (4, toDate('2023-11-01'), 'November Event'), (5, toDate('2025-01-01'), 'Future Event');
SELECT subtractYears(event_date, a.N) AS modified_date FROM test_dates, (SELECT arrayJoin(range(0, 10)) AS N) AS a WHERE id = 1;

WITH (SELECT subtractYears(event_date, a.N) AS subtracted FROM test_dates JOIN (SELECT arrayJoin(range(1, 5)) AS N) AS a ON test_dates.id = 2) AS sub_date SELECT sub_date.subtracted AS date_after_subtraction FROM sub_date;
CREATE TABLE test_edge_cases (id UInt32, date_string String, date_value DateTime64(3));
SELECT date_string, subtractYears(tupleElement((SELECT date_value FROM test_edge_cases WHERE id = 1), 1), 1) AS new_date FROM test_edge_cases;

WITH (SELECT toDate('2024-06-15') AS base_date, arrayJoin(range(1, 3)) AS years) AS params SELECT subtractYears(base_date, years) AS result FROM params GROUP BY base_date, years HAVING result > toDate('2020-01-01');
SELECT (subtractYears(toDate('2020-01-01'), 1) || ' on ' || toString(toDate('2020-01-01'))) AS combined FROM test_dates;
WITH (SELECT MAX(toUnixTimestamp(NOW())) AS time_stamp) AS current_time SELECT subtractYears(toDateTime(current_time.time_stamp), 10) AS date_from_unix WHERE current_time.time_stamp IS NOT NULL;
